criteria.criterion: The index-visibility wait in tests/integration/test_reconcile_live_e2e.py is made robust to group-load lag (e.g. longer/adaptive backoff, or a create→visible retry helper) so the full live group passes reliably.

citation.description: Ticket comment by Joe Oakhart: 'Ran the full live E2E suite serially (pytest tests/integration/test_reconcile_live_e2e.py -n0) THREE times: all 15 tests passed each run (incl. the previously-flaky @_requires_live test_delete_permission_probe) — no never became index-visible failures. Runs: 6.68s / 11.97s / (run 3 below).' Code fix is in place: _poll_until_visible with exponential backoff (2^attempt, capped at 8s) and 120s default budget at lines 379-439.

criteria.criterion: pytest tests/integration/test_reconcile_live_e2e.py (all 12, serial) passes repeatedly against the live test project (no 'never became index-visible').
No change to CI behavior (these tests still self-skip without live creds).
